title: Fix post-registration navigation to immediately open chat list

requirements.summary: Fix the post-registration navigation flow so that after a successful createUser call, the app transitions directly to the chat list screen without intermediate loading states or loops back to registration
acceptanceCriteria: After submitting the registration form and receiving a successful response from createUser, the app immediately renders the chat list screen.
The user is never shown a loading screen or redirected back to the registration screen after successful account creation.
The currentUser/profile state is populated before the navigation logic evaluates which screen to show.
If registration fails, the user remains on the registration screen and sees a readable error message.

file_operations.description: Update the registration mutation's onSuccess callback to immediately invalidate and refetch the currentUserProfile query, ensuring the profile state is updated before any navigation logic runs. Add proper error handling to display user-friendly error messages on registration failure and prevent navigation when errors occur.

Refactor the screen rendering logic to ensure that after a successful registration (when userProfile is non-null), the app immediately shows the chat list screen. Remove or adjust any conditions that cause intermediate loading states or loops back to the registration screen. Ensure the navigation logic correctly evaluates the currentUser/profile state synchronously after it has been populated by the registration flow.
